evals.prompt: Research the navigation system in this codebase and document how it works. This project is a Claude Code plugin with skills, agents, and commands.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive research document following the prism-research template with file:line references
expectations: Research document covers navigation-related files (NavigationContext, Sidebar, TopBar, AppShell, or equivalent routing components)
Document includes file:line references, not just file names
Document follows YYYY-MM-DD-topic.md naming convention
Output is saved to .prism/shared/research/ directory
Document has required sections: Research Question, Summary, Files Discovered, Component Analysis
No improvement suggestions or critiques appear (documentarian principle)

evals.prompt: Research the agent spawning architecture in this codebase. How do skills invoke agents via the Task tool?
evals.expected_output: Research document produced using graph-navigator agent and parallel agent spawning
expectations: graph-navigator agent is spawned for structural orientation (Step 1b)
prism-locator agent is spawned to check existing research
codebase-locator and/or codebase-analyzer agents are spawned
Multiple agents are spawned in parallel where independent
No improvement suggestions appear (documentarian, not critic)
Research output references structural relationships between skills and agents

evals.prompt: Understand how the Spectrum autonomous execution workflow works in this project. Research the spectrum.sh script and prism-spectrum skill.
evals.expected_output: Research document covering the Spectrum loop, signals, and state management
expectations: Mentioned files (spectrum.sh, SKILL.md) are read FULLY before spawning agents (Rule: Read files first)
Document describes the signal protocol (spectrum-continue, spectrum-retry, spectrum-blocked, spectrum-error, promise COMPLETE)
Document describes stories.json state management
Document describes fresh-context-per-iteration principle
No recommendations for how to improve the workflow appear
All agents complete before synthesis (Rule: Wait for completion)

evals.prompt: Map out the skill discovery and routing system in this plugin. How does the prism meta-skill route to phase-specific skills?
evals.expected_output: Research document covering skill YAML frontmatter, trigger matching, and the prism meta-router
expectations: prism-locator agent is used to check for existing research
Output is saved to .prism/shared/research/ directory
Document includes file:line references to SKILL.md files
codebase-locator agent is spawned to find skill files
Research template sections are all present (Summary, Files Discovered, etc.)
TodoWrite is used to track open questions if any arise
